p.c: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(s, x, y, z)
not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not z ∈ s)
not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z and z <= y)
not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z)
not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y)
not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s and y ∈ s)
not (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not z ∈ s) or disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z)
not (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z and z <= y) or disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or z ∈ s
not (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z) or not z <= y or disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or z ∈ s
not (x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y) or not z <= y or not x <= z or disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or z ∈ s
not (x ∈ s and y ∈ s) or not x < y or not z <= y or not x <= z or disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) or z ∈ s

goal: is_connected_real_set(s) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) }

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(s)
not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
not forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } or is_connected_real_set(s)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[Real](z)
not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true
disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z + Real.0)
is_connected_real_set(s) and x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z
function(x0: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true }(x)
(forall(x0: Real) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x1: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x, x0, x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x, x0, x1) } = true })
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true }(x, y)
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, x0) or not is_connected_real_set(s) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, x0) })
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) }(x, y, z + Real.0)
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) })

goal: disconnecting_triple(s.intersection(t), x, y, z) = (s.intersection(t).contains(x) and s.intersection(t).contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not s.intersection(t).contains(z))

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(s ∩ t, x, y, z)
not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s ∩ t and y ∈ s ∩ t and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not z ∈ s ∩ t)
not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s ∩ t and y ∈ s ∩ t and x < y and x <= z and z <= y)
not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s ∩ t and y ∈ s ∩ t and x < y and x <= z)
not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x, y, z) or (x ∈ s ∩ t and y ∈ s ∩ t and x < y)

not (x ∈ s ∩ t and y ∈ s ∩ t and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not z ∈ s ∩ t) or disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x, y, z)
not (x ∈ s ∩ t and y ∈ s ∩ t and x < y and x <= z and z <= y) or disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x, y, z) or z ∈ s ∩ t

function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(s ∩ t)
not is_connected_real_set(s ∩ t) or forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s ∩ t) or forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s ∩ t) or forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) } = true })
(forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s ∩ t) or not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) })
not forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) } or is_connected_real_set(s ∩ t)
exists(k0: Real, k1: Real, k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, k0, k1, k2) } or is_connected_real_set(s ∩ t)
exists(k0: Real, k1: Real, k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, k0, k1, k2) }
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) or false = true }(w0, w3, w5)
not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, w5)

goal: disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), x, y, z) = (Set.singleton(a).contains(x) and Set.singleton(a).contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not Set.singleton(a).contains(z))
